caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "YOU NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" is seated in a room filled with framed photos on the wall and clothing racks in the background. He wears black headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. To his right, a white headless mannequin is visible. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left and another on the right that reads "BOSS LIFE TV". Across the sequence, the man is talking and smiling, shifting his facial expressions and gesturing with his right hand in the second frame. The background remains static as he continues to communicate, with his head moving slightly as he speaks.
